slides.headline: Automate Certifications, Track Compliance
slides.body: VASCO Assistant Pro simplifies your certification process, ensuring accurate, compliant student veteran education.

slides.headline: Identify Errors
slides.body: Quickly identify certification issues with real-time tracking and error detection tools.
bullets: Real-time tracking of student veteran education

slides.headline: Correct Errors
slides.body: Easily correct errors using pre-built templates and automated corrections.

slides.headline: Prevent Future Errors
slides.body: Implement preventive measures with customizable rules and alerts.

slides.headline: Streamline Compliance
slides.body: Maintain compliance with automated reporting and continuous monitoring.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Ensure student veteran education is supported with real-time communication and tracking.

outline.caption: Recover from certification errors with VASCO Assistant Pro. Automate your certification process, track compliance, and support student veterans.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Prevent Future Errors,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
